reason: Trades.jsonl wiped 2026-05-14 (Option A). Original BASELINE was +$25.68 = NET pnl across all pre-wipe live trades. 2026-05-15 update: split the 14 LOST orphans out as proper LOST records (status=LOST, _orphan_synth=False so reconciler counts them). Their pnl sums to $-24.78. BASELINE re-priced from $25.68 to $50.46 so total realized stays $25.68 (= chain - initial - deposits, the math the wipe destroyed).
